actions.name: Spirit Away (Resolution)

cost.trigger: The user used Spirit Away (Set-Up) as their last Action, and they are still Grappling the target.

actions.description:
Trigger: The user used Spirit Away (Set-Up) as their last Action, and they are still Grappling the target.

Effect: The user and the target are cured of @Affliction[invisible]. On hit, the target gains @Affliction[confused 7] and is Flinched 40%, and both the user and target lose @Affliction[grapple]. On resolution, the freely Moves itself double the Movement Score of the user's choice as per Teleport Movement.

actions.name: Spirit Away (Set-Up)
actions.description: Effect: On hit, the target is Force Moved (as per Teleport Movement) to the user, with the user automatically succeeding on a @Affliction[grapple] check against the target and both creatures gain @Affliction[invisible 2]. The user gains +60 to opposed Grapple checks for 2 Activations.
